title.ko: 반딧불 루시페린 — ATP 의존 황록 발광

subtitle.en: luciferase oxidises luciferin in the presence of ATP, Mg²⁺, and O₂; the excited oxyluciferin product emits 560 nm; rate is so linear in ATP that fireflies make superb biological ATP meters
subtitle.ko: Luciferase가 luciferin을 ATP·Mg²⁺·O₂로 산화 → oxyluciferin*이 560 nm 방출; ATP에 선형이라 생물학 ATP 미터

description.en: Firefly abdomen glow scales linearly with ATP. Linearity plot demonstrates how the same enzyme powers food-safety and cell-viability ATP assays.
description.ko: 반딧불 복부 glow가 ATP에 선형. 선형성 플롯이 식품 안전·세포 viability 분석의 원리 표시.
